import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Target } from 'lucide-react'; const BudgetSettings = () => { const [budgets, setBudgets] = useState({ monthly: 3000, food: 500, transport: 300, entertainment: 200, shopping: 400 }); const [actualSpending, setActualSpending] = useState({ food: 320, transport: 280, entertainment: 150, shopping: 350 }); return (

Budget Settings

{/* Food */}
Food
${budgets.food}
Spent: ${actualSpending.food} {((actualSpending.food / budgets.food) * 100).toFixed(1)}%
{/* Transport */}
Transport
${budgets.transport}
Spent: ${actualSpending.transport} {((actualSpending.transport / budgets.transport) * 100).toFixed(1)}%
{/* Entertainment */}
Entertainment
${budgets.entertainment}
Spent: ${actualSpending.entertainment} {((actualSpending.entertainment / budgets.entertainment) * 100).toFixed(1)}%
{/* Shopping */}
Shopping
${budgets.shopping}
Spent: ${actualSpending.shopping} {((actualSpending.shopping / budgets.shopping) * 100).toFixed(1)}%
); }; export default BudgetSettings;
